title: Room 1: Algorithm Forge
description: Mechanical arms sort glowing cubes. The system asks what an algorithm is.
question: Which option best defines an algorithm?
answers: A step-by-step procedure to solve a problem
success: The forge hums smoothly and the first gate opens.

title: Room 2: Data Tower
description: Holographic arrays float in the air. A console asks which structure follows FIFO order.
question: Which data structure follows first-in, first-out order?
hint: Think of a line of people waiting.
success: The tower rotates and reveals the next staircase.

title: Room 3: Binary Lock
description: A keypad flashes in two symbols only. The lock asks how many values a binary digit can hold.
question: How many possible values can a single binary digit represent?
success: The binary lights settle into a safe green pattern.
